page_header.label: AUDITS
page_header.title: Security Audits
page_header.description: Transparency about our audit status and roadmap. We believe in honest disclosure above marketing claims.

paragraphs: ZKIRA Pay has not yet been formally audited.
We believe in transparency over marketing. While our code is open source and built with security-first principles, we have not yet engaged professional audit firms for formal security reviews.

sections.heading: What This Means:
items: Use ZKIRA Pay on testnet and devnet for experimentation
Mainnet deployment awaits formal audit completion

sections.label: SECURITY ROADMAP
sections.title: Our Path to Mainnet
sections.subtitle: We believe in transparency. Here's our detailed security roadmap and timeline for formal audits and mainnet launch.

items.title: Open-Source Code Review
items.description: Community testing and review on devnet. All code public on GitHub for transparent examination by security researchers and developers.

items.title: Professional Audit Engagement
items.description: Engage professional security audit firms specializing in Solana smart contracts. Multiple auditors for comprehensive coverage of Anchor programs and core architecture.

items.title: Audit Reports & Bug Bounty
items.description: Publication of formal audit reports with full transparency. Launch of public bug bounty program to incentivize ongoing security research.

items.title: Mainnet Launch
items.description: Full production deployment on Solana mainnet after successful audit completion and remediation. Public launch with confidence in security posture.

items.title: Open Source Everything
items.description: Every line of code is public on GitHub. Smart contracts, frontend, API, documentation—nothing is hidden. The community can review and verify our implementation.

items.title: Self-Custody Model
items.description: We never hold private keys or custody funds. All assets remain under user control in their own wallets. ZKIRA operates as a non-custodial coordination layer only.

items.title: No Admin Keys
items.description: Smart contracts have no admin privileges or upgrade authority. Once deployed, programs are immutable and operate purely according to their code—no human intervention possible.

items.title: Time-Lock Escrows
items.description: All escrows have configurable expiry times with automatic refund mechanisms. Funds cannot be permanently lost or stuck—worst case is delayed refund to the sender.

sections.label: AUDIT REPORTS
sections.title: Reports will be published here
sections.subtitle: When audit reports become available, they will be published on this page with full transparency and detailed remediation status.

paragraphs: Formal audit reports will be published here as they become available. We commit to full transparency in our security assessment process.

sections.title: Review our code today
sections.description: While we await formal audits, we encourage the community to review our open source code and provide feedback on our security implementation.
